step_rationale: CXCL10 receptor mediating Th1/leukocyte recruitment and atherosclerotic plaque inflammation.
mechanism: CXCR3 transduces chemokine signals recruiting inflammatory Th1 cells and monocytes to destabilize plaques.

references.title: Genetic Variation in the Chemokine Network and Atherosclerosis Risk.
Single-cell transcriptomic analysis of peripheral blood mononuclear cells reveals key immune responses in ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
The multifaceted functions of CXCL10 in cardiovascular disease.
